questions.context_sentence: I'm the one with the pink hat.
questions.hint: 他（h）有一顶帽子（at）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我是那个戴粉色帽子的人。

questions.context_sentence: It shows great respect to my grandfather.
questions.hint: re (反复) + spect (看) = 反复看，表示尊敬。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这表示对我祖父/外祖父极大的尊敬。

questions.context_sentence: What does family mean to you?
questions.hint: ea组合发/i:/，这句话在问意思。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 家人对你来说意味着什么？

questions.context_sentence: He spends a lot of time fishing.
questions.hint: 花钱花时间，用end结尾，花完了就结束了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他花很多时间钓鱼。

questions.context_sentence: Fred is Jack and Sarah's son.
questions.hint: 儿子（son）像太阳（sun）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 弗雷德是杰克和莎拉的儿子。

questions.context_sentence: She can play it really well!
questions.hint: real (真的) + ly (副词后缀) = 真的，非常。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 她打得/弹得/演奏得非常好！

questions.prompt: My grandparents have three ____ren. (提示: 孙辈)
questions.context_sentence: My grandparents have three grandchildren.
questions.hint: grand (大的/长辈) + child (孩子) = 孙辈。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我的祖父母/外祖父母有三个孙子/女。

questions.context_sentence: your grandmother's husband - E. grandfather
questions.hint: hus (house缩写感) + band (绑定) = 绑定在家里的人（丈夫）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你祖母/外祖母的丈夫——E. 祖父/外祖父

questions.context_sentence: My little brother, Sam, is on his knee.
questions.hint: k不发音，ee发/i:/，膝盖在呢（knee）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我的小弟弟萨姆正跪在他的膝盖上。

questions.context_sentence: They're my grandparents.
questions.hint: grand (大的/长辈) + parent (父母) = 祖父母。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他们是我的祖父母/外祖父母。

questions.context_sentence: Sam is seven, and he really likes chess.
questions.hint: 车（ch）死（ess）了，下棋把车下死了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 萨姆七岁了，他真的很喜欢国际象棋。

questions.context_sentence: Do you often play ping-pong together?
questions.hint: to + get + her，去接她，然后就在一起了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你们经常一起打乒乓球吗？

questions.context_sentence: this is my ping-pong bat
questions.hint: 蝙蝠也是bat，想象用球拍打蝙蝠。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这是我的乒乓球拍。

questions.context_sentence: I'm the one with the pink hat.
questions.hint: 他（h）有一顶帽子（at）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我是那个戴粉色帽子的人。

questions.context_sentence: Sam is seven, and he really likes chess.
questions.hint: 车（ch）死（ess）了，下棋把车下死了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 萨姆七岁了，他真的很喜欢国际象棋。

questions.prompt: ____ him is my mum. (提示: 旁边)
questions.context_sentence: Next to him is my mum.
questions.hint: 下一个（next）到（to）旁边。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他旁边是我的妈妈。

questions.context_sentence: Match the definitions with members of the family.
questions.hint: 记忆（remember）里面的成员（member）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 将定义与家庭成员匹配。

questions.prompt: ____ (v. & n.远足;徒步旅行) (提示: 徒步旅行)
questions.context_sentence: She likes to go hiking.
questions.hint: 骑车（bike）去远足（hike）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 她喜欢去徒步旅行。

questions.context_sentence: complete the table about Teng Fei's family activities.
questions.hint: act (行动) + ivity (名词后缀) = 活动。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 完成关于腾飞家庭活动的表格。

questions.context_sentence: He is really funny, and he often makes us laugh.
questions.hint: fun (乐趣) + ny = 有趣的，好笑的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他真的很有趣，他经常逗我们笑。

questions.context_sentence: My sister is very different.
questions.hint: differ (不同) + ent (形容词后缀)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我的妹妹/姐姐非常与众不同。

questions.context_sentence: He's very handsome.
questions.hint: hand (手) + some (一些) = 手巧又英俊。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他非常英俊。

questions.prompt: What does family ____ to you? (提示: 表示（意义）)
questions.context_sentence: What does family mean to you?
questions.hint: ea组合发/i:/，这句话在问意思。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 家人对你来说意味着什么？

questions.prompt: Alan is my ____. (提示: 名字)
questions.context_sentence: Alan is my first name.
questions.hint: first (第一) + name (名字) = 第一个名字。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 艾伦是我的名字。

questions.prompt: this is my ping-pong ____ (提示: 球拍)
questions.context_sentence: this is my ping-pong bat
questions.hint: 蝙蝠也是bat，想象用球拍打蝙蝠。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这是我的乒乓球拍。

questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 是的，我们每天都玩/打球。
